title: Salesforce Security and Automation
description:
Want to build secure and efficient Salesforce apps? Security and automation are more than simply technical skills; they are the key to developing smarter, safer, and more scalable applications.  

This comprehensive Security & Automation in Salesforce App Builder course is intended to help you thrive in real-world scenarios and go one step closer to your Salesforce App Builder certification. 

You'll learn about the most popular Salesforce features—data access protocols, permission settings, role hierarchies, and sharing rules—via engaging videos, hands-on activities, and real-world scenarios. You will also learn how to use Workflow, Process Builder, and Flows to successfully streamline and automate business procedures. 

Whether you're a new developer, administrator, or Salesforce professional, this Salesforce Platform App Builder course will teach you how to secure your apps, automate more effectively, and achieve business impact. 

By the end, you won't just understand Salesforce—you'll be equipped with future-ready skills to lead innovation, boost performance, and accelerate your career growth.
